options.name: --additional
options.description: An argument to pass to Clang when parsing the input files. []

options.name: --config
options.description: A configuration option that controls how the bindings are generated. Specify 'help' to see the available options. []

options.name: --define-macro
options.description: Define <macro> to <value> (or 1 if <value> omitted). []

options.name: --exclude
options.description: A declaration name to exclude from binding generation. []

options.name: --file
options.description: A file to parse and generate bindings for. []

options.name: --file-directory
options.description: The base path for files to parse. []

options.name: --headerFile
options.description: A file which contains the header to prefix every generated file with. []

options.name: --include
options.description: A declaration name to include in binding generation. []

options.name: --include-directory
options.description: Add directory to include search path. []

options.name: --language
options.description: Treat subsequent input files as having type <language>. [default: c++]

options.name: --libraryPath
options.description: The string to use in the DllImport attribute used when generating bindings. []

options.name: --methodClassName
options.description: The name of the static class that will contain the generated method bindings. [default: Methods]

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace in which to place the generated bindings. []

options.name: --output-mode
options.description: The mode describing how the information collected from the headers are presented in the resultant bindings. [default: CSharp]

options.name: --output
options.description: The output location to write the generated bindings to. []

options.name: --prefixStrip
options.description: The prefix to strip from the generated method bindings. []

options.name: --nativeTypeNamesToStrip
options.description: The contents to strip from the generated NativeTypeName attributes. []

options.name: --remap
options.description: A declaration name to be remapped to another name during binding generation. []

options.name: -std
options.description: Language standard to compile for. []

options.name: --test-output
options.description: The output location to write the generated tests to. []

options.name: --traverse
options.description: A file name included either directly or indirectly by -f that should be traversed during binding generation. []

options.name: --version
options.description: Prints the current version information for the tool and its native dependencies.

options.name: --with-access-specifier
options.description: An access specifier to be used with the given qualified or remapped declaration name during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-attribute
options.description: An attribute to be added to the given remapped declaration name during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-callconv
options.description: A calling convention to be used for the given declaration during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-class
options.description: A class to be used for the given remapped constant or function declaration name during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-guid
options.description: A GUID to be used for the given declaration during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-length
options.description: A length to be used for the given declaration during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-librarypath
options.description: A library path to be used for the given declaration during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-manual-import
options.description: A remapped function name to be treated as a manual import during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-namespace
options.description: A namespace to be used for the given remapped declaration name during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-packing
options.description: Overrides the StructLayoutAttribute.Pack property for the given type. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-readonly
options.description: Add the readonly modifier to a given instance method. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-setlasterror
options.description: Add the SetLastError=true modifier or SetsSystemLastError attribute to a given DllImport or UnmanagedFunctionPointer. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-suppressgctransition
options.description: Add the SuppressGCTransition calling convention to a given DllImport or UnmanagedFunctionPointer. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-transparent-struct
options.description: A remapped type name to be treated as a transparent wrapper during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-type
options.description: A type to be used for the given enum declaration during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --with-using
options.description: A using directive to be included for the given remapped declaration name during binding generation. Supports wildcards. []

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
